6.reason: [Using ~scanf is incorrect; scanf returns EOF on failure, and ~EOF is not a reliable loop condition. Also, this loop does not stop at newline, causing buffer overflow and undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using ~scanf is incorrect; scanf returns EOF on failure, and ~EOF is not a reliable loop condition. Also, this loop does not stop at newline, causing buffer overflow and undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using ~scanf is incorrect; scanf returns the number of successfully read items, and ~ (bitwise NOT) on that leads to infinite loop or undefined behavior. Also, this loop doesn't stop at newline properly.]
